_readme: ContentForge ships NO active hooks as of v3.9.0. Earlier versions registered SessionStart, PreToolUse, SubagentStart, and Stop hooks that fired on EVERY Claude Code operation in EVERY project — even unrelated ones. Their work (hallucination checks, brand-voice rules, completion verification) already lives in the right place: the Phase 7 reviewer agent, the agent files themselves, and the Quality Gate criteria. Global hooks added latency, token cost, and noise to operations outside ContentForge content production. To re-enable a specific hook (e.g., a per-session reminder), add an entry below. The 'hooks-reference.example.json' file in this directory documents the prior set with rationale notes for each.
